ehonda-stand-heavy-punch.name: Standing Heavy Punch
notes: Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter if the opponent is standing on the ground
Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent
Can be canceled up until the 3rd active frame
Can be canceled by Hundred Hand Slap from frames 8 - 14 if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda-stand-medium-kick.name: Standing Medium Kick
notes: Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda-stand-heavy-kick.name: Standing Heavy Kick
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda-crouch-light-punch.name: Crouching Light Punch
notes: Can be rapid canceled

ehonda-crouch-heavy-punch.name: Crouching Heavy Punch
notes: Adds +2 frames of recovery on armor hit or if the attack misses
Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda-crouch-light-kick.name: Crouching Light Kick
notes: Can be rapid canceled
Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda-crouch-medium-kick.name: Crouching Medium Kick
notes: Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

ehonda-crouch-heavy-kick.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
notes: Knockdown time extended when attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter

ehonda-jump-medium-punch.name: Jumping Medium Punch
notes: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

ehonda-jump-heavy-punch.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
notes: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

hundred-hand-slap-light.name: Hundred Hand Slap (Light)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

sumo-spirit-hundred-hand-slap-light.name: Sumo Spirit Hundred Hand Slap (Light)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Only transitions into the final hit if the 2nd hit connects
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

hundred-hand-slap-medium.name: Hundred Hand Slap (Medium)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

sumo-spirit-hundred-hand-slap-medium.name: Sumo Spirit Hundred Hand Slap (Medium)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Only transitions into the final hit if the 5th hit connects
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

hundred-hand-slap-heavy.name: Hundred Hand Slap (Heavy)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

sumo-spirit-hundred-hand-slap-heavy.name: Sumo Spirit Hundred Hand Slap (Heavy)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Only transitions into the final hit if the 8th hit connects
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

hundred-hand-slap-od.name: Hundred Hand Slap (OD)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

sumo-spirit-hundred-hand-slap-od.name: Sumo Spirit Hundred Hand Slap (OD)
notes: Unleash a series of high-speed slaps. Useful for creating combos from normal moves
Only the last hit can be canceled
Only transitions into the final hit if the 5th hit connects
Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

sumo-headbutt-light.name: Sumo Headbutt (Light)
notes: Fly horizontally forward with a powerful headbutt. Useful as a surprise attack to approach your opponent, as well as a way to tack on additional hits in combos
Can be canceled until the 4th active frame
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 4 - 13
Considered airborne from frames 14 - 33
Does 1000 damage after the 5th active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 4 - 13

sumo-headbutt-medium.name: Sumo Headbutt (Medium)
notes: Fly horizontally forward with a powerful headbutt. Useful as a surprise attack to approach your opponent, as well as a way to tack on additional hits in combos
Can be canceled until the 4th active frame
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 13
Considered airborne from frames 14 - 35
Does 1100 damage after the 5th active frame

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 13

sumo-headbutt-heavy.name: Sumo Headbutt (Heavy)
notes: Fly horizontally forward with a powerful headbutt. Useful as a surprise attack to approach your opponent, as well as a way to tack on additional hits in combos
Can be canceled until the 4th active frame
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 16
Considered airborne from frames 18 - 40
Does 1300 damage after the 5th active frame
If Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 19th frame, transitions into ending animation action

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 16

sumo-headbutt-od.name: Sumo Headbutt (OD)
notes: Fly horizontally forward with a powerful headbutt. Useful as a surprise attack to approach your opponent, as well as a way to tack on additional hits in combos
Super Armor for 2 hits from the 1st frame until the end of the active frames
If Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 27th frame, transitions into ending animation action
Considered airborne from frame 14
Always in Punish Counter state during execution

sumo-smash-light.name: Sumo Smash (Light)
sumo-smash-light.name_ja: スーパー百貫落とし (弱)
notes: Leap diagonally into the air and then descend directly downward with a hip slam. Useful as a way to launch a surprise attack while avoiding grounded attacks, and as a way to pressure an opponent's guard
Has cross-up attack properties
Produces a wall bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish Counter
If the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800
Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

sumo-smash-medium.name: Sumo Smash (Medium)
sumo-smash-medium.name_ja: スーパー百貫落とし (中)
notes: Leap diagonally into the air and then descend directly downward with a hip slam. Useful as a way to launch a surprise attack while avoiding grounded attacks, and as a way to pressure an opponent's guard
Has cross-up attack properties
Produces a wall bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish Counter
If the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800
Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

sumo-smash-heavy.name: Sumo Smash (Heavy)
sumo-smash-heavy.name_ja: スーパー百貫落とし (強)
notes: Leap diagonally into the air and then descend directly downward with a hip slam. Useful as a way to launch a surprise attack while avoiding grounded attacks, and as a way to pressure an opponent's guard
Has cross-up attack properties
Produces a wall bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish Counter
If the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800
Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

sumo-smash-od.name: Sumo Smash (OD)
notes: Leap diagonally into the air and then descend directly downward with a hip slam. Useful as a way to launch a surprise attack while avoiding grounded attacks, and as a way to pressure an opponent's guard
Has cross-up attack properties
Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 17
Invincible to throws from frames 5 - 13
Produces a wall bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish Counter
If the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800
Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

invuln.strike: Invincible against projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 17

oicho-throw-light.name: Oicho Throw (Light)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent by the head, slam them into the ground, and follow up with a Sumo Slam. Useful for breaking through an opponent's guard at close range
Damage set to 2300 on Punish Counter

oicho-throw-medium.name: Oicho Throw (Medium)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent by the head, slam them into the ground, and follow up with a Sumo Slam. Useful for breaking through an opponent's guard at close range
Damage set to 2645 on Punish Counter

oicho-throw-heavy.name: Oicho Throw (Heavy)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent by the head, slam them into the ground, and follow up with a Sumo Slam. Useful for breaking through an opponent's guard at close range
With Classic Controls
Does 2760 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
With Modern Controls
Does 2208 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

oicho-throw-od.name: Oicho Throw (OD)
notes: When near opponent
Grab your opponent by the head, slam them into the ground, and follow up with a Sumo Slam. Useful for breaking through an opponent's guard at close range
With Classic Controls
Does 3220 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter
With Modern Controls
Does 2576 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

sumo-dash.name: Sumo Dash
notes: Move forward with a traditional sumo shuffle. Useful for closing the distance with your opponent
Can transition to Taiho Cannon Lift or Teppo Triple Slap from frames 14 - 43

sumo-dash-od.name: Sumo Dash (OD)
notes: Move forward with a traditional sumo shuffle. Useful for closing the distance with your opponent
Can transition to Teppo Triple Slap from frames 13 - 27
Can transition to Taiho Cannon Lift from frames 11 - 27

teppo-triple-slap-1.name: Teppo Triple Slap (1)
notes: During Sumo Dash
A sequence of slaps performed from Sumo Dash. Useful for checking your opponent up close or as a way to continue your offensive pressure
Can only transition to the last hit on frame 34 if the attack hits

teppo-triple-slap-2.name: Teppo Triple Slap (2)
notes: During Sumo Dash
A sequence of slaps performed from Sumo Dash. Useful for checking your opponent up close or as a way to continue your offensive pressure

teppo-triple-slap-od-1.name: Teppo Triple Slap (OD 1)
notes: During Sumo Dash OD
A sequence of slaps performed from Sumo Dash. Useful for checking your opponent up close or as a way to continue your offensive pressure
Can transition to the final attack on the 33th frame on either hit or block.

teppo-triple-slap-od-2.name: Teppo Triple Slap (OD 2)
notes: During Sumo Dash OD
A sequence of slaps performed from Sumo Dash. Useful for checking your opponent up close or as a way to continue your offensive pressure

taiho-cannon-lift.name: Taiho Cannon Lift
notes: During Sumo Dash
A sequence of two strikes performed from Sumo Dash that launch an opponent into the air. Can be used to deal big damage in combos performed on opponents who have left themselves wide open
On hit, recovery is 15 frames and the total attack is 49 frames

taiho-cannon-lift-od.name: Taiho Cannon Lift (OD)
notes: During Sumo Dash OD
A sequence of two strikes performed from Sumo Dash that launch an opponent into the air. Can be used to deal big damage in combos performed on opponents who have left themselves wide open
On hit, recovery is 15 frames and the total attack is 49 frames

neko-damashi.name: Neko Damashi
notes: Clap the palms of both hands together in front of your face. Not only can it be used as an attack, but it can also be used to negate projectiles
Has a clash hitbox from frames 11 - 15
Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

sumo-spirit.name: Sumo Spirit
notes: Perform a sumo kata that enhances your next Hundred Hand Slap. This enhancement will be maintained until a Hundred Hand Slap is used
Stocks Sumo Spirit on frame 51
Changes the properties of the next Hundred Hand Slap performed

show-of-force.name: Show of Force
notes: Push your opponent out of the sumo ring with a mighty shove. This move is invincible at the beginning, making it useful for turning the tables on your opponent
Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 11
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

invuln.strike: Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 11

ultimate-killer-head-ram.name: Ultimate Killer Head Ram
notes: Perform a headbutt followed by a sequence of slaps, and finish off with a final twisting headbutt. The initial headbutt travels a long distance, making it excellent both in combos and as a way of dealing with projectiles
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 18
Invincible to projectiles from frames 19 - 36
Transitions to hand slaps if the second hit of the headbutt connects
Transitions again during the last hit of the hand slaps
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter
If Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 24th frame, transitions into ending animation action

the-final-bout.name: The Final Bout
notes: When under 25% vitality

Swing your opponent in a circle to draw the outline of a sumo ring, then just as you're about to push them out of it, throw them to the ground behind you with a brutal slam. This move has long reach and comes out quickly, making it quite versatile
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

the-final-bout-ca.name: The Final Bout (Critical Art)
notes: Swing your opponent in a circle to draw the outline of a sumo ring, then just as you're about to push them out of it, throw them to the ground behind you with a brutal slam. This move has long reach and comes out quickly, making it quite versatile
Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11
Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%
Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

harai-kick.name: Harai Kick
notes: A low attack with long reach that cannot be blocked standing
Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter

power-stomp.name: Power Stomp
notes: An overhead attack that cannot be blocked while crouching
Produces a floor bound and hard knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
Can cancel into a special move or Super Art on frame 15 when the attack misses

flying-sumo-press.name: Flying Sumo Press
flying-sumo-press.name_ja: フライングスモウプレス
notes: During a forward jump
A body press with an area of attack so wide that it can hit an opponent even if it crosses over them
Has cross-up attack properties

double-slaps.name: Double Slaps
notes: A quick series of attacks that can be canceled into special moves

toko-shizume.name: Toko Shizume
notes: A series of attacks, the second of which cannot be blocked crouching
Produces a floor bound and hard knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent
Can cancel into a special move or Super Art on frame 14 when the attack misses
Can only be canceled into Sumo Spirit on hit

saba-ori.name: Saba Ori
notes: When near opponent
Clasp both arms around your opponent's back, squeeze them, and slam them to the ground. Throws your opponent without switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown

tawara-throw.name: Tawara Throw
notes: When near opponent
Clasp both arms around your opponent's back and toss them behind you. Throws your opponent while switching places with them
Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:
- Deals 2040 damage
- Super Art gauge increases by 4000
- Forces a hard knockdown
